authority_contract.rule: LLM repair loops are allowed when a general criterion has objective machine evidence: PASS/FAIL/DIFF, coverage gap, lint diagnostic, assertion failure, stale evidence, traceability gap, or measured performance gap. Human gates own intent, semantic rule changes, waivers, interface changes, performance tradeoffs, and final signoff.

general_evaluation_criteria.criterion: Every generated artifact traces to SSOT requirement, function_model, cycle_model, interface, coverage, or quality_gates refs.
RTL observable behavior matches FunctionalModel results for every required transaction/scenario.
Each behavior-owning RTL module has module-boundary evidence before top-level signoff.
SSOT coverage goals are hit by passing RTL-observed scoreboard evidence.
Ports, handshakes, ordering, reset, and error protocol obey SSOT io_list/cycle_model/interface contract.
DUT-only RTL compile/lint has zero unwaived errors, warnings, and style diagnostics.
Simulation results are fresh, bounded, non-stale, and tied to structured scoreboard goals.
Cycle/performance targets from cycle_model/timing are measured or explicitly escalated.
Waveforms and debug probes are sufficient to inspect reset, interface activity, state, outputs, and failures.
Generated RTL/TB is structured by SSOT-owned modules, avoids fixed IP templates, and remains reviewable.
Intent, semantic rule changes, waivers, interface changes, performance tradeoffs, and final signoff are human-owned.

locked_artifacts.name: requirement
locked_artifacts.change_rule: Human owns intent, scope, priority, tradeoffs, and final acceptance.

locked_artifacts.name: ssot_spec
locked_artifacts.change_rule: Behavior, interface, coverage goal, and waiver changes require human gate.

locked_artifacts.name: functional_model
locked_artifacts.change_rule: FunctionalModel is the golden oracle; sim-debug cannot change it to match RTL.

locked_artifacts.name: coverage_plan
locked_artifacts.change_rule: LLM may add tests to hit bins, but cannot weaken or delete bins without approval.

locked_artifacts.name: interface_contract
locked_artifacts.change_rule: Protocol and port contract changes require human approval.

locked_artifacts.name: performance_target
locked_artifacts.change_rule: LLM may sweep candidates, but target/tradeoff changes require human approval.

loopable_evidence_points.criterion: SSOT refs vs generated artifact refs
loopable_evidence_points.llm_action: Add missing refs/artifact ownership or open a human gate if ownership is undefined.

loopable_evidence_points.criterion: FunctionalModel.apply expected values vs RTL observed values
scope.level=module equivalence goal against RTL module boundary observations
loopable_evidence_points.llm_action: Patch the owning RTL module only.

loopable_evidence_points.criterion: coverage goals vs RTL-observed scoreboard coverage rows
loopable_evidence_points.llm_action: Add stimulus/tests/vectors without changing coverage goals.
Patch RTL syntax, widths, drivers, and coding style.
Patch RTL or TB driver/monitor depending on classified owner.
Run parameter/architecture sweeps and report tradeoff candidates.

loopable_evidence_points.criterion: minimal vector still reproduces the same failure
scoreboard diff, logs, coverage miss, and waveform evidence
loopable_evidence_points.llm_action: Write root-cause report and repair prompt.

loopable_oracles.criterion: SSOT refs vs generated artifact refs
loopable_oracles.llm_action: Add missing refs/artifact ownership or open a human gate if ownership is undefined.

loopable_oracles.criterion: FunctionalModel.apply expected values vs RTL observed values
scope.level=module equivalence goal against RTL module boundary observations
loopable_oracles.llm_action: Patch the owning RTL module only.

loopable_oracles.criterion: coverage goals vs RTL-observed scoreboard coverage rows
loopable_oracles.llm_action: Add stimulus/tests/vectors without changing coverage goals.
Patch RTL syntax, widths, drivers, and coding style.
Patch RTL or TB driver/monitor depending on classified owner.
Run parameter/architecture sweeps and report tradeoff candidates.

loopable_oracles.criterion: minimal vector still reproduces the same failure
scoreboard diff, logs, coverage miss, and waveform evidence
loopable_oracles.llm_action: Write root-cause report and repair prompt.

non_loopable_decisions: change performance target or architecture tradeoff

goals.title: Transaction pwm_active_high matches FunctionalModel

expected_contract.latency: cycle_model latency/ordering must hold when applicable

pass_criteria: Scoreboard calls FunctionalModel.apply with the same transaction intent
RTL observed outputs equal FL expected outputs
RTL side effects match FL model state updates
Linked functional coverage bins are hit when stimulus executes

goals.title: Scenario SC1: Basic PWM generation

constraints: Set period=10, duty_cycle=3, enable=1 for 30 clock cycles

observables: 3 clocks of pwm_out=1, 7 clocks of pwm_out=0, repeating 3 times
expected_contract.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario

pass_criteria: Generated sequence executes the SSOT stimulus
Scoreboard expected result comes from FunctionalModel.apply and SSOT scenario expected field
RTL observed result matches expected result
Scenario coverage bin is hit

goals.title: Scenario SC2: Duty cycle variation

constraints: Start with duty_cycle=3, period=10; change duty_cycle to 7 after first period

observables: First period: 3 high / 7 low; second period: 7 high / 3 low
expected_contract.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario

pass_criteria: Generated sequence executes the SSOT stimulus
Scoreboard expected result comes from FunctionalModel.apply and SSOT scenario expected field
RTL observed result matches expected result
Scenario coverage bin is hit

goals.title: Scenario SC3: Period rollover

constraints: Set period=5, duty_cycle=2, enable=1 for 15 clock cycles

expected_contract.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario

pass_criteria: Generated sequence executes the SSOT stimulus
Scoreboard expected result comes from FunctionalModel.apply and SSOT scenario expected field
RTL observed result matches expected result
Scenario coverage bin is hit

goals.title: Scenario SC4: Disable behavior

constraints: Enable PWM with period=10, duty_cycle=3; disable after 5 clocks; re-enable after 5 more clocks

observables: When enable=0: pwm_out=0, counter=0. When re-enabled: starts from counter=0
expected_contract.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario

pass_criteria: Generated sequence executes the SSOT stimulus
Scoreboard expected result comes from FunctionalModel.apply and SSOT scenario expected field
RTL observed result matches expected result
Scenario coverage bin is hit

goals.title: Cycle/handshake rule handshake_0

constraints: {'signal': 'pwm_out', 'rule': 'Combinational output derived from counter vs duty_cycle comparison; no valid/ready handshake'}

observables: ready/valid/control observables named by SSOT and DUT ports
expected_contract.latency: {'counter_update': {'min_cycles': 1, 'max_cycles': 1, 'description': 'Counter increments or wraps every clock edge when enabled'}, 'pwm_output': {'min_cycles': 1, 'max_cycles': 1, 'description': 'pwm_out reflects counter vs duty_cycle comparison on same edge'}}

pass_criteria: RTL holds payload/control stability according to cycle_model
Handshake completion timing matches cycle_model latency/ordering
Protocol coverage bin is hit

goals.title: Ordering rule ordering_0

constraints: Counter update and output comparison occur in the same clock cycle.

expected_contract.latency: {'counter_update': {'min_cycles': 1, 'max_cycles': 1, 'description': 'Counter increments or wraps every clock edge when enabled'}, 'pwm_output': {'min_cycles': 1, 'max_cycles': 1, 'description': 'pwm_out reflects counter vs duty_cycle comparison on same edge'}}

pass_criteria: RTL response order matches cycle_model ordering
FL trace and RTL monitor trace preserve the same transaction order

goals.title: Error policy None

constraints: {'id': 'ERR_NONE', 'condition': 'No error sources in this minimal IP', 'architectural_effect': 'N/A'}

expected_contract.latency: error propagation timing from cycle_model
expected_contract.error_policy: ['No error propagation in this educational IP.']

pass_criteria: Fault stimulus produces the SSOT-defined error response
No illegal side effect occurs unless SSOT allows it
Error coverage bin is hit

goals.title: FSM transition pwm_fsm: IDLE -> RUNNING

expected_contract.latency: next-state timing from cycle_model pipeline/latency

pass_criteria: RTL state transition matches SSOT condition
FSM transition coverage bin is hit

goals.title: FSM transition pwm_fsm: RUNNING -> IDLE

expected_contract.latency: next-state timing from cycle_model pipeline/latency

pass_criteria: RTL state transition matches SSOT condition

goals.title: Required debug/waveform observability exists

expected_contract.latency: throughout simulation window

pass_criteria: Waveform includes SSOT-required debug probes
sim_debug can inspect those probes around checked scenarios

goals.title: Module simple_pwm functionality equals FunctionalModel

scope.boundary: module RTL observable outputs must be compared against FunctionalModel.apply

constraints: Use the module boundary stimulus/monitor contract from SSOT decomposition; do not compare against RTL-internal self-derived expected values.

expected_contract.latency: cycle_model latency/ordering must hold at the module boundary

pass_criteria: Drive the RTL module boundary with stimulus derived from the same SSOT transaction intent used for FunctionalModel.apply
Observe only RTL module boundary outputs/state exposed by SSOT or rtl_contract
Compare RTL observed values against FunctionalModel.apply output; do not copy FL expected into rtl_observed
Record a scoreboard row for this module goal before top-level signoff
